description: AI-enhanced browser-based tool with text-to-speech, word prediction, and dictionary features tailored for neurodiversity, supporting dyslexic and autistic users in reading and writing.

description: Motion AI automatically plans your work and adds tasks to your calendar based on rules you determine, reducing executive function strain for neurodivergent users.

description: Detailed guide on body doubling as a specific tool for neurodivergent task initiation, explaining how to find thought partners.
title: The OT Toolbox - Body Doubling Guide

description: Official Apple App Store page for Tiimo, enabling neurodivergent users to download the app for sensory regulation through visual timelines and AI planning features.

description: An open-source Pomodoro timer available on GitHub, offering customizable work intervals and reminder notifications to help neurodivergent users manage time and tasks effectively.

description: A leading assistive/alternative communication app for iPad and iPhone designed to help non-speaking children and adults express themselves confidently.

description: Community platform offering open-source coping skill resources, including the WARMTH Framework toolkit and autism-affirming training for young people.
